case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC ASSIGNEE OF FIA VS. MARY C LANGFORD et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LANGFORD, MARY C

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-30-2009 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT MARY LANGFORD'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; NOT REPORTED (206)
